title: TERMS OF SERVICE (Part 1/2)
heading_chain: Links to Parichay by other websites/portals
heading: TERMS OF SERVICE
text: * Be a natural person to access or seek to access Service. * Parichay Service account. * Details on Parichay may only be accessed through the Parichay portal, and only using the username and authentication details which have been specifically allocated to you. * You must not transmit via Parichay any unlawful, defamatory, obscene, offensive or scandalous material, or any material that constitutes or encourages conduct that would contravene any law. * If, within your Parichay account, you are asked to provide information, the information you supply must be complete and accurate. You acknowledge that if you supply incomplete, inaccurate or false information, use Parichay to perform (or attempt to perform) an unauthorized action, or otherwise misuse Parichay then it may suspend or terminate your Parichay access. * Giving false or misleading information is a serious offence. Providing incomplete, inaccurate or false information via Parichay will be treated in the same way as providing incorrect information on a form or in person and may result in prosecution and civil or criminal penalties. Material featured on this website/portal shall not be reproduced anywhere without the explicit written permission of NIC. However, if the material has to be reproduced with permission, then such reproduction should be done accurately and not to be used in a derogatory manner or in a misleading context. Wherever the material is being published or issued to others, the source must be prominently acknowledged. However, the permission to reproduce this material shall not extend to any material which is identified as being #### HYPERLINKING POLICY ###### Links to external websites/portals At some places on Parichay, you shall find links to other websites/portals. These links have been placed for your convenience. Parichay is not responsible for the contents of thelinked websites/services and does not necessarily endorse the views expressed in them.
